programme.desc: The pugs travel to an archeology site to find artifacts for Bob's sister. Then, when a noisy squirrel keeps Bob from getting work done, the pugs must work together to get the squirrel back to its family.

programme.desc: Bluey and her friends want to play a game of 'Shops'; Bluey and her family take a trip to the pool; The family plays with hand puppets.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Murderer on Main St.
programme.desc: A beloved resident of a tight-knit Nebraska town is brutally murdered, leading detectives to look at a wide range of suspects before the trail leads to a killer who lives among them.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Shadow
programme.desc: The save the date cards had gone out. Angie Ver Huel went to sleep next to her fiancé, Justin Michael, with big dreams but woke up to a nightmare. Someone was running from their bedroom and Justin was dead.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Marc Despain was a married father of two and a successful real estate appraiser. He was busy building a life, until his ended all too soon. Investigators wondered if money was a motive, or maybe a family rift. His loved ones wanted answers.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: A beautiful, popular graduate student is shot dead outside her apartment in Durham, North Carolina.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Trap
programme.desc: It was an affluent neighborhood with tree lined streets. Violent crime was unheard of here until that morning when, under the very noses of the cops, a terrible murder occurred. Investigators found a riddle, a deception, a piece of pure evil.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Exchange
programme.desc: German foreign exchange student and soccer player, Diren Dede’s dream of studying in America came true when he began his junior year at a Montana high school. When he decides to play a reckless teenage game, the consequences turn deadly.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Hometown Hero & the Homecoming Queen
programme.desc: Dave Laut won a bronze medal at the 1984 Olympics. California is where Dave grew up, met his wife Jane and lost his life. Jane said it was a prowler but Dave was found dead outside, and a gun was found outside.

programme.title: Snapped: Latoya Woodard
programme.desc: When a devoted father is found brutally stabbed to death in his Deltona, Florida, home, detectives turn their focus to the picture-perfect family who appeared to have it all.

programme.title: Snapped: Lynn Boyd
programme.desc: After a well-known business owner is found dead in his Lake Orion apartment, investigators are left untangling a web of lies to uncover a deadly duo looking to get rich quick.

programme.title: Snapped: Maria Hernandez
programme.desc: The American Dream for a hard-working immigrant is suddenly cut short, when he is violently murdered with a hatchet in the streets of a Las Vegas suburb. Investigators sift through lies and follow a bloody trail to uncover the shocking truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Ultimatum
programme.desc: Michele and Lloyd Neurauter were devoted to their three daughters, even after divorce. When Michele was found dead in her home, police suspected suicide. Then, they uncovered a deadly betrayal too twisted to be true. Except that it was.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: House Of Secrets
programme.desc: Charlie Tan was an Ivy Leaguer with a bright future but then, Charlie's dad was killed. Police were told one story but the evidence was telling another.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Musclehead Murders/ Murder in the Keys
programme.desc: A wealthy Miami couple disappears leaving an abandoned Lamborghini. Police are perplexed until a rich businessman comes forward with a bizarre and torturous tale of a group of muscled men looking for a fast way to flashy cars and a fabulous lifestyle.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Killer Succession/ Dial 911 for Murder
programme.desc: A car bomb explodes rocking the millionaire enclave of Naples, Florida. Tobacco heiress Margaret Benson and her son are victims of a double homicide. Her severely injured daughter clings to life, and may be the police’s only hope for an eyewitness.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Blood in the Backyard
programme.desc: A mom and her newborn inexplicably vanish from their California home. When blood is discovered in their backyard, a grieving father is scrutinized and investigators race against the clock to bring this mother and child home before it's too late.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Deadly Ally

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Dead Girls Don't Talk

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Devil in Our Country
programme.desc: A pleasant Michigan day takes a dark turn when a field hand digs up a human skull in a sprawling backyard. The discovery leaves a tight knit community shaken to its core and questioning whether a killer has penetrated the safety of their town.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Femme Fatale
programme.desc: When a private investigator disappears with tens of thousands of dollars, Florida detectives question whether she's alive and well. But when a buried body is uncovered, they chase a trail of secrets and lies to catch a killer just out of reach.

programme.title: Movie: Angry Birds
programme.desc: An island of happy, flightless birds is visited by a ship of mysterious green pigs, led by Leonard. Red, a bird with anger problems, doesn't trust them, but he is ignored. When their eggs go missing, it is up to Red and his friends to get them back.

programme.title: Unearthed: Vesuvius's Secret Victim
programme.desc: Scientists are using cutting edge technology to unearth a second city that, like the well-known city of Pompeii, was destroyed when Vesuvius erupted in 79 AD. This new town is revealed to be one of the most well-preserved Roman towns on earth.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Preserved Ancient Murder
programme.desc: Six bodies carefully buried in the Egyptian desert are preserved unlike any mummies ever discovered and remain a mystery for over a century; now, experts use cutting-edge tech to unlock their secrets and reveal an ancient cold-case of murder.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Enigma of The Giants
programme.desc: Abnormally large bones unearthed from an elaborate network of caves fails to align with the known progress of human evolution.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Salem Witches
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Finding Nefertiti
programme.desc: Scientists have spent years looking for the mummy of Nefertiti, one of ancient Egypt's most iconic pharaohs. The latest tech helps experts in their search, what they discover might reveal the shocking truth about how she died, and Egypt’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Enigma of The Giants
programme.desc: Abnormally large bones unearthed from an elaborate network of caves fails to align with the known progress of human evolution.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Salem Witches
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Grave of the Red Skulls
programme.desc: When experts discover a 500-year-old grave, they find mysterious red skulls, pointing to a shocking mass sacrifice; experts use the latest technology and state-of-the-art forensics to investigate what happened at this horrific site.

programme.title: The Planets: Mars: The Definitive Guide
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino reveals the answers to some of the greatest mysteries on the Red Planet. Using the most detailed survey of Mars ever created, he discovers the dark history of our closest neighbor.

programme.title: The Planets: Saturn: Mysteries Among the Rings
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino reveals the mysterious secrets of Saturn and its rings. Using the latest science from the Cassini mission, he explores the planet's giant icy geysers, powerful hurricanes, and the moon that may be hiding extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: The Planets and Beyond: Mercury: The Cursed Planet
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino explores Mercury, a deadly and tiny planet that faces constant attacks from the Sun, and which might one day pose a threat to all life on Earth.

programme.title: The Planets: Venus: The Hell Planet
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino explores Venus, a hellish planet covered in active volcanoes and dense clouds. Using cutting-edge technology, he decodes the secrets beneath this volatile planet and investigates if Earth could be heading towards the same fate.

programme.title: The Planets: Jupiter: King of the Planets
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino leads a journey to Jupiter, the biggest and most extreme planet in our Solar System. Using new discoveries and the latest science, he investigates Jupiter's deepest mysteries and if it is actually our Sun's secret twin.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: The Universe's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: A new breed of explorers is risking their careers, and even their lives, to lead humanity to worlds we have never seen. From the beginning of our Solar System to the evolution of the Universe, these heroes are tackling the mysteries of life itself.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secret History of the Voyager Mission
programme.desc: Voyager has had a profound effect on our knowledge of the cosmos. Its mission was supposed to last five years but remains ongoing, changing our understanding of the solar system. With contributions from key scientists, we explore what happens next.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secrets of the Seven Earths
programme.desc: The new discovery of seven alien Earth-like planets in a faraway solar system is a major milestone in our hunt for extraterrestrial life, and experts investigate the secrets of TRAPPIST-1's mysterious worlds to reveal if we're truly alone in the universe.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Finding Alien Moons
programme.desc: New discoveries are helping experts in their search for the first alien moon outside our solar system, which could be Earth-like worlds with the potential for life. So far, they haven't found any, but twenty-first century methods might change everything.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Mystery of the Alien Asteroid
programme.desc: When a strange alien object is discovered speeding through the solar system, experts race to uncover if it's real evidence of extraterrestrial contact, or a deadly asteroid on a collision course with planet earth.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Rise of the Red Planet
programme.desc: The latest science reveals what it would take to build colonies on Mars, and how our future on the Red Planet might be closer than we think.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Earth: Venus's Evil Twin
programme.desc: There is a hellish planet in our solar system, covered in thick dense clouds and roasted by colossal temperatures. Incredibly this is a vision of Earth's future. To understand how our world will be destroyed we need to look at Earth's evil twin Venus.

programme.title: Deadly Women: The Dark Side
programme.desc: These women aren't afraid to take a walk on the dark side.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hot Tempers, Cold Hearts
programme.desc: When these Deadly Women turn green-eyed they reveal their hot tempers and cold hearts.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Kill the Competition
programme.desc: In the game of love the stakes are high not everyone can be a winner.

programme.title: True Conviction: A Long Road to Justice
programme.desc: Anna-Sigga Nicolazzi meets the detective and prosecutor who took on the case of Karen Ann Watson, a wife and mother who was brutally stabbed to death. Nearly 30 years after the crime, they track down a killer who thinks he got away with murder.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Gone Girls
programme.desc: In July, 2018, 25-year-old Danniella Vian, a young mother from Mobile, Alabama, disappears into thin air. And then 19-year-old Holly Moore's suspicious death still raises questions four years after her body is found hanging from her closet.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Targeted in the Night
programme.desc: A 10-year-old girl walks home from her friend's house at dusk and then mysteriously vanishes. As it becomes clear she's been abducted, suspicion falls on a series of men. Then, a night of celebration ends in murder for a young entrepreneur.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Hustlers
programme.desc: The real-life story that inspired a hit movie. A group of strip club workers take business into their own hands going as far as conspiring to drug male targets and fleece them for all they could.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Death and Silence
programme.desc: The body of a young musician turns up in an alley. Police learn she's been spending time with an older man.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Targeted in the Night
programme.desc: A 10-year-old girl walks home from her friend's house at dusk and then mysteriously vanishes. As it becomes clear she's been abducted, suspicion falls on a series of men. Then, a night of celebration ends in murder for a young entrepreneur.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: My Son Is Not a Monster
programme.desc: An 11-year-old's soon-to be step-mom is found murdered in their home. A child-sized shotgun, gun residue on his clothes, and a witness account all seem to point to the boy as the shooter.

programme.title: True Conviction: The Stalker
programme.desc: After computer whiz Cari Farver goes missing, she starts sending threatening text messages to a new boyfriend, his ex-lover and her mother.

programme.title: Twisted: Murder Mates
programme.desc: In 1984, a killer couple goes on a brutal killing spree throughout the Midwest. After claiming the lives of 8 victims, the pair must decide if they'll keep killing or surrender to the police. Their mindless violence leaves the region shocked and appalled.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: Monster Among Us
programme.desc: A monster hunts the streets of Baton Rouge, leaving three women raped, murdered and sadistically posed and everyone in town on edge. But when one brave woman survives a vicious attack, evidence leads police to the hunter and eventually justice.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: In Too Deep
programme.desc: A submerged car pulled from a Florida canal brings a startling discovery: the body of 39-year-old Beverly Jackson. Police explore the single mom's work route and relationships, but it will take the help of a hotline tipster to track down her killer.

programme.title: Southern Fried Homicide: The Perfect Poisoner
programme.desc: Prim and proper Marie Hilley of Anniston, Alabama is left to fend for herself after a mysterious illness overtakes her husband. Despite a life insurance payout, her debts keep piling up as the same illness threatens to kill her daughter as well.

programme.title: Southern Fried Homicide: Romance is Dead
programme.desc: In 2010, Julia Phillips calls police to the home of her boyfriend Melvin Roberts. Officers find Melvin murdered and Julia bound in duct tape. As detectives begin digging, they uncover a deadly scandal that rocks this small southern town to its core.

programme.title: Homicide City: Charlotte: Auditing Evil
programme.desc: North Carolina State Insurance auditor, Sallie Rohrbach, disappears during a routine assignment in Charlotte. Detectives follow leads in the search of Sallie, hitting numerous dead-ends until discovering the horrific truth and her killer's identity.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: The Sinner
programme.desc: When a young husband is shot dead in his Morris, Alabama home, police initially believe it's a robbery gone awry. But once the town rumor mill swirls to life, authorities uncover a dark secret hiding between the pews of the local Baptist church.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Last Curtain Call
programme.desc: Like in one of his old Hollywood westerns, a former actor is gunned down in Yuma, AZ and police chase leads across the Southwest until they finally get their man.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: How to Get Away With Murder
programme.desc: Convicted killer Christopher Waide speaks to 20/20 from prison to discuss how he almost got away with the murder of Lea Porter in 2014. He was able to cover up his crime with the skills he learned from a criminology class.

programme.title: Lone Star Justice: Cold as Ice
programme.desc: A woman asks Detective Joe Rasco to reopen the 1982 unsolved murder of her cousin Catheryn Powell. In doing so, he discovers a case filled with false leads, dead ends and fake confessions.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Friendly Fire
programme.desc: An abandoned car belonging to missing sailor Nicholas Cox turns up in a parking lot. Inside, Demery uncovers a grisly cache of blood evidence, but no Cox. In order to find justice for his fallen brother-in-arms, Demery must first locate his body.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: Holy Terror
programme.desc: Charlotte, NC Homicide Detective Garry McFadden finds himself playing a frustrating cat-and-mouse game with a seemingly religious family of church-goers, pastors and a killer.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: She Said...
programme.desc: When a terrified sex worker asks Detective Penny Hart for help, she knows it must be serious. Things quickly intensify when the same frightened informant goes missing and is feared to be dead.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Secrets
programme.desc: From the Great Phenol Plot of WWI to the D-Day deception Operation Fortitude, and from the world's first large-scale cyberattack to the greatest counterfeiting scheme in history, learn about the greatest secrets of warfare of the last century.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Missing Masterpiece
programme.desc: The painting 'Portrait of a Young Man' by Raphael, is the most valuable piece of art stolen by the Nazis.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Burqueños
programme.desc: Lou Ferrante is in Albuquerque, to meet one of the world’s fastest growing prison gangs – The Burqueños.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Camorra
programme.desc: Lou visits Naples, a place with one of the oldest, most powerful gangs in the world – The Camorra. A number of bodies have recently been found in the city, causing world headlines.

programme.title: Mafia vs. JFK
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroys his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Mafia's Day of Reckoning
programme.desc: What happened when the FBI pursued the five families who ran organised crime in New York, and the fate of two informers is revealed.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror
programme.desc: It's the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lures ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and takes them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Colombian Rambo
programme.desc: In 1980 the trickle of cocaine coming in to Florida suddenly becomes a flood and drug wars erupt on the streets. Carlos Lehder is behind it all. The DEA must take him down before he destroys the USA with the drug he calls Latin America's 'atomic bomb'.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Cowboys vs. Hollywood
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, it's time to rethink Hollywood's vision of the old west and learn about the truth behind some of America's renowned rivalries.

programme.title: Gourmet Holiday

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Edge of Maine
programme.desc: A creative family builds a three-story tiny house full of clever features in the easternmost property in the U.S. But with limited experience and a tight deadline, they'll need the help of a few locals to get it done. Follow their journey now.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Lake Superior Lodge
programme.desc: A couple races to finish a modern, off-grid lodge overlooking the south shores of Lake Superior.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Lighthouse
programme.desc: After witnessing the demise of Casco Bay's Halfway Rock lighthouse, Ford Reiche has the chance to return this icon to its former glory. It will take barges full of scaffolding, masons, and the cooperation of Mother Nature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Domes
programme.desc: Laura Williams is on a mission to build an off-the-grid home in the desert outside of Tucson, Arizona. She builds an earthen three-dome home by hand battling a steep learning curve and Mother Nature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: A couple plans to build an oceanfront oasis for their family on the slopes of Maui, Hawaii. To keep the budget low, they design a Quonset hut which can be built cheaply and quickly, but unexpected setbacks test their limits at every turn.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin of No Return
programme.desc: An outdoorsy family of three is determined to build a mammoth off-grid cabin along Idaho's Salmon River after one of their properties was destroyed by a fire. The family takes on rapids to portage out materials and must finish before low tide hits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Modern Farmhouse
programme.desc: A family builds an ultra-modern farmhouse completely off the grid in the verdant Wisconsin countryside. When the project extends into winter, they're pushed to the breaking point as they face the impact of extreme cold on the build and themselves.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: A couple plans to build an oceanfront oasis for their family on the slopes of Maui, Hawaii. To keep the budget low, they design a Quonset hut which can be built cheaply and quickly, but unexpected setbacks test their limits at every turn.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return To K-Town
programme.desc: Mike and Tay build a commemorative clock for the town of Kannapolis, North Carolina, before the crew heads back to salvage items left behind on the first trip, including a large cupola, windows and a bank vault.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Turning a Ramshackle Cabin Into a Guest House In Missouri
programme.desc: The guys take down and rebuild a historic 170-year-old cabin. Sherman leads the guys in converting this cabin into a guest house for kindred spirit client, Mark Perry.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Raising a Massive Timber Frame Barn in Downtown Lewisburg
programme.desc: Mark and the guys work in downtown Lewisburg, West Virginia, to raise a massive timber frame as the new shelter for the Lewisburg farmer's market. The 200-year-old logs prove to be a challenge when the builders begin to raise the bents.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Building a Log Chapel With a Stained Glass Window
programme.desc: Mark and the guys head to Johnny Jett's hometown in Kentucky to build a log chapel. First, they reclaim a stained glass window from a deteriorating 100-year-old church. Then they build the chapel and install the window.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Salvaging Pristine Hand-Hewn Logs from a West Virginia Cabin
programme.desc: Mark and the guys travel to the heart of West Virginia, to salvage incredibly rare 170-year-old logs from a perfectly preserved log home. The pressure is on to keep these logs pristine as they take them down.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Taking Down a Huge New England Style Barn
programme.desc: Mark and the guys make a rare trip north to dismantle an enormous, 200-year old barn. The barn is so big it takes extra hands to get the barnwood down, and a crane to lift out the valuable beams.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Kettle House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley get the opportunity to renovate a bizarre Galveston icon that may harbor a few surprises inside. The spaceship-shaped landmark is soon brimming with life as the Cordrays bring their unique charm to the one-of-a-kind house.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Mystery House
programme.desc: Michael surprises Ashley with an 1893 raised cottage that he purchased before seeing the full interior. The duo soon finds themselves in over their heads when they realize it's not quite the hidden gem Michael thought it was.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Duplex Conversion
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley learn that a coveted property is for sale while crabbing off the Galveston coast.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Destined for Demo
programme.desc: Ashley is feeling extremely overwhelmed.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat in Music City
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to the country music capital Nashville, where chefs are playing meaty tunes. At Urban Grub, Chef Edgar Pendley fans the flames in a massive 18-foot-tall hearth and hangs a wall of house-made andouille sausages and pork ribs.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Revolutionary Roasts
programme.desc: Mass. Roger puts the pedal to the metal on Chef Jeremy Stanton's 'Rotisserie Bike.'

programme.title: Man v. Food: Houston, TX
programme.desc: Casey two-steps down to Houston, Texas, for some tex-mex tastiness, including a colossal 22-ounce chicken-fried steak and the ultimate spicy challenge: a burger topped with seven of the world's hottest chile peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New Orleans, LA
programme.desc: Casey heads to New Orleans to taste the best of the Big Easy, including a mammoth po' boy and a four-pound sundae packed with eight large scoops of ice cream and smothered with eight different toppings.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Baltimore, MD
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epic eating expedition brings him to Baltimore for an out-of-this-world diner, a classic crab feast and a four-pound pho fight.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Savannah, GA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels down to Georgia to taste some the Savannah's best fried chicken, low country seafood boil and a four-pound pulled pork sandwich known only as the Pigzilla.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Alaska
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide feast brings him to Alaska, where he cracks into crab legs fit for a king at Slippery Salmon Bar and Grill in Anchorage. In Talkeetna, he samples the local wild game, ordering a slab of reindeer meatloaf at Denali BrewPub.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Mystic, Connecticut
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to Mystic, Conn., to conquer land and sea with a totally bonkers, Portuguese-inspired burger and a crazy coastal feast of chowder.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Barbara, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek takes him to Santa Barbara, California, where he first feasts on a 2-pound portion of steamed local crab. Then he meets up with a tri-tip steak sandwich served with homemade barbecue sauce and apple horseradish.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Portland, Maine
programme.desc: Casey Webb's edible expedition takes him to Portland, Maine, for a surf-and-turf lobster lovefest, a potato-donut-cannoli mashup and a really, really big taco packed with ground beef, chicken and carnitas.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sausages, Franks and Dogs
programme.desc: In Sagaponack, N.Y., Michael Symon heads to a smokehouse where succulent, slow-smoked pork ribs are mopped with a tangy, citrus barbecue sauce. In Columbus, Ohio, there's a beefy burger topped with smoky kielbasa.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bacon Behemoths
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to Providence, where a traditional Rhode Island hot wiener in a crepe topped with chili is the ultimate local comfort food. In Indianapolis, he digs into a steak patty topped with Chinese char siu slaw.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoking Meats And Summertime Eats
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to Charleston, S.C., where he smokes a whole hog on a supersized indoor smoke pit and devours a slow-smoked rib-eye steak sandwich complete with melted cheddar and caramelized onions.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Comedy and Cooking in the City of Angels
programme.desc: Michael Symon and hilarious TV star Billy Gardell embark on an uproarious adventure in Los Angeles filled with laughter, hijinks and visiting a perfect balance of legendary food joints and new spots on the scene.

programme.title: Movie: Love, Fall and Order

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The One That Got Away

programme.desc: Reba learns that Van has hired a nanny so he can spend more time goofing off.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Stan Takes a Wife

programme.title: Movie: A Royal Winter

programme.desc: An engaged couple host guests at their new bed and breakfast, where they also plan to be married. When a distant relative arrives and stakes claim on the inn, their wedding plans end up in turmoil.

programme.title: Movie: The Art of Us

programme.desc: A jeweler notices that a victim wore an elephant pendant that had been pawned in her shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: When a 9-year old girl disappears, an anonymous caller leads police to her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: For Love or Money
programme.desc: A wealthy man goes missing, and leaves behind instructions in his will regarding what should be done if he died of violent circumstances, leading to believe he was aware his life was in danger.

programme.title: Forensic Files: South of the Border
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in Mexico seems to be burglary related. However, closer examination by law officials both sides of the border reveal a far more sinister truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two children is found dead near suicide notes and a pistol. At first it is assumed to be a suicide, but when police learn she had nearly been killed in a fire three years earlier, new suspicions are raised.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Paintball
programme.desc: In 1962, the people of the small town of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15 year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered. It would take 24 years to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here

programme.desc: Repo Man Ken Cage attempts to nab two high-end yachts in two days. Kevin Lacey's favour for a friend turns into a white-knuckle landing under darkening Texas skies in a plane with no radio on a runway with no lights.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Armed on Arrival
programme.desc: Mike Kennedy calls in his 'A-Team' in order to snag a Czechoslovakian fighter jet. Ken Cage and Danny Thompson go after a $2-million Citation CJ1 and end up under fire. Kevin Lacey has a run in with an old adversary at the Sundance Air Show.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: The Blonde Bomber
programme.desc: Always one to push the limits, Mike Kennedy attempts his first helicopter heist. Danny puts his partnership with Ken in jeopardy when he steps out on his own to repossess a Cessna 340. Kevin uses his new protégé as bait to snatch a 1941 Stearman biplane.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Wounded Warbird
programme.desc: Kevin Lacey greenlights Heather Sterzick's first solo repo, but she pays the price for her mistakes. Mike Kennedy returns to his old stomping grounds in Puerto Rico to recover a relic from the old family business.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Repo Roulette
programme.desc: Stuntman turned Repo Pilot Mike Kennedy skydives into an airfield to snatch a Dehavilland Twin Otter airplane. Later, Ken Cage and Danny Thompson make a risky two-vehicle snatch from a wealthy playboy.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: No Rescue Repo
programme.desc: Super Repo Man Mike Kennedy boldly risks an emergency landing on a remote Alaskan glacier, while strongman Danny Thompson frees a $1.8-million Lear 31 from its hangar by hand.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Armed and Airborne
programme.desc: Nick Popovich and his team of experts track down private jets for repossession. Nick enlists his youngest son to gather photo intelligence, which prove crucial in an assignment riddled with unforeseen obstacles.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: We've Got an Emergency Situation
programme.desc: Nick Popovich and his team of experts hunt down multi-million dollar aircraft from bases throughout the country for repossession. Launching spotters in the field and repo pilots in the cockpit, they risk it all to return luxury planes to their owners.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Melissa M's Story

programme.desc: Maja needs weight-loss surgery so she can lose weight, but Dr. Now won't approve her for surgery if she can't overcome getting dumped by her boyfriend Christian without using food to cope. Justin charts a course to be one of Dr. Now's best patients ever.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Walking on Broken Glass
programme.desc: Dr. Brad and Dr. Sarah have their hands full when they are faced with twins that have identical toe problems. Also, a boy with extremely itchy feet and a woman born with a massively large toe are desperate for Dr. Ebonie's help.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Big Time

programme.title: Sex and the City: Easy Come, Easy Go

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Got MILF?
programme.desc: Feeling that Kanye is constantly misunderstood and unfairly vilified, Kim struggles over whether to publicly take a stand for her husband. Kim also prepares for her sexy cameo in Fergie's 'MILF$' music video.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Havana Good Day
programme.desc: The girls jet off for a once in a lifetime trip to the formerly restricted country of Cuba. Meanwhile, Kourtney butts heads with a family member and Kris starts to lose it when she can't reach her girls overseas.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Havana Good Night
programme.desc: As the Kardashian Cuban vacation continues, Kim’s commitment to her work engagements on Mother’s Day stirs up a disagreement. Meanwhile, Scott comes down with a major case of FOMO, and Kim tries to resolve the tension over Kylie’s Puma endorsement.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Digital Rage
programme.desc: The drama between Rob and the family flares up again after Chyna launches an app they find questionable. Meanwhile, Scott is on a mission to prove that Kourtney's allergies are fake.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Blood, Sweat and Fears
programme.desc: When Kris sees how deeply Khloé is struggling, she urges Rob to reconnect with his sister and best friend. Meanwhile, Kourtney worries that she will give Scott mixed messages if she joins him in Vegas, and Kris pushes herself too far working out.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Love at First Fight
programme.desc: When Rob and Chyna get into an explosive fight, the girls rally behind them with hopes that they can fix their relationship. Meanwhile, the family tries to convince Khloé to break her streak of bad birthdays.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Comment
programme.desc: When Scott accidentally causes some speculation that Khloe and Tristan are back together, Khloe is overwhelmed by the backlash online. The family worries that Kim is going through a difficult time and tries to cheer her up. Kendall has baby fever.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Journey to Healing
programme.desc: Scott experiences some troubling health issues and Kim heads to Washington to meet with some formerly incarcerated women. Khloe is determined to cure Kim of her fear of spiders.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Trouble in Palm Springs
programme.desc: After months of tension among the sisters, Kris plans a getaway to Palm Springs for her daughters to bond, but a major fight between Kendall and Kylie derails the trip.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Sister, Sister and a Babymoon
programme.desc: Khloe takes her bestie on one last trip before her due date, but worries that some issues with Malika’s baby daddy might send her friend into early labor. The family deals with the fallout of Kendall and Kylie’s big fight in Palm Springs.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Things Fall Apart: Covid-19
programme.desc: As L.A. prepares for a potential lockdown, Khloe falls ill and worries that she may have Covid-19. Malika goes into labor and cannot bring her support system to the hospital.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Losing it in Lockdown
programme.desc: Kim struggles to balance work life and mom life in quarantine, while Khloe gets creative to keep herself entertained. The family encourages Kendall and Kylie to reconcile after their argument in Palm Springs.

programme.title: Top Chef: It's Like They Never Left!
programme.desc: Fifteen of the competition’s fiercest challengers return to face-off in this season. The first elimination challenge finds the chefs on a beach to cook a seafood meal, with fire being their only heat source. They also have no electricity or appliances.

programme.title: Top Chef: The Jonathan Gold Standard
programme.desc: This week the chefs honour the late, great Pulitzer-Prize winning food critic Jonathan Gold. The chefs create dishes to serve 200 of Jonathan Gold's friends, family and restaurateurs that he loved at the iconic Union Station.

programme.title: Top Chef: Strokes of Genius
programme.desc: Comedic superstars Ali Wong and Randall Park swing by the Top Chef kitchen for a Quickfire Challenge tasking the chefs to make the wackiest fried rice they can. Then, the chefs head to the famed Getty Museum to seek inspiration.

programme.title: Top Chef: You're So Fresh
programme.desc: Kelly Clarkson drops by for a quick-fire challenge based on her movie, 'Trolls: World Tour.' The chefs are split into two teams to create a vegetarian meal for the elimination challenge, but they won't know their ingredients until the morning of.

programme.title: Top Chef: Bring Your Loved One to Work
programme.desc: In the quick fire, the chefs play a game of telephone with their loved ones as they try to reproduce the dish their family member is currently eating at a nearby restaurant. Then, they are tasked with creating a signature product that they will sell.

programme.title: Top Chef: Get Your Phil
programme.desc: The chefs meet conductor Gustavo Dudamel who is about to celebrate the LA Philharmonic's 100th anniversary. The chefs must treat their flavour profiles like musical instruments. Finally they serve members of the philharmonic in the elimination challenge.

programme.title: Top Chef: Pitch Perfect
programme.desc: The chefs are challenged to a taco throw down for the taco king, actor and restaurateur Danny Trejo. Then, restaurant wars begin as they pitch a concept and compete with a couple of dishes. The two best concepts will be built for the challenge.

programme.title: Top Chef: Restaurant Wars
programme.desc: This season for restaurant wars Padma takes all the limitations off the table as the chefs can make as much food as they want and shop wherever they choose. The winning chefs from last week have 48 hours to pick their team and complete their restaurants.

programme.title: Top Chef: Cabin Fever
programme.desc: The chefs head to the mountains and take part in an outdoor grilling quick fire for 'Top Chef' winner Kelsey Barnard Clark. Before the sun rises, the chefs must create an upscale brunch buffet for 200 moms with a very limited stock pantry.

programme.title: Top Chef: Colossal Coliseum Kaiseki
programme.desc: Pastry super-chef Sherry Yard dishes out a dessert quick fire challenge. The chefs are then shown a traditional Japanese Kaiseki meal, the ultimate in simplicity, restraint and precision. The chefs prepare this meal for Olympic medallists.

programme.title: Top Chef: Michael’s Santa Monica
programme.desc: Tom makes his final decision from last chance kitchen on who should return to the competition. The chefs meet Michael McCarty, the legendary pioneer of California cuisine. The six chefs must reimagine one of his dishes if they hope to make the finals.

programme.desc: The Heelers take a trip to Hammerbarn. Bingo has an idea for a new game. By waving her featherwand she can make objects impossibly heavy. Dad eats Bingo's last chip.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Total Yodel / Bob's Birthday Wish
programme.desc: After Bob has trouble learning to yodel, the Pugs decide to go on a mission to the Swiss Alps to get yodeling tips. It’s Bob’s birthday and his sister, Bonnie, is acting sneaky.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keep On Food Truckin'/ Pupigan's Island
programme.desc: The pugs plan to bring Bob's favorite food truck back to him but Cupcake and Rufus have a different plan. Bob and the pups are on a whale tour when their boat runs into an island.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Go Baby Go/ Baby Freddy

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Ultimate Easter Egg Hunt/ A Chewy Challenge
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy’s next delivery, an egg, gets mixed up with the eggs for the Annual Easter Egg Hunt! Pip braves the desert heat with Freddy to deliver a baby camel to nomad parents!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: No Bones About It/ Bob's Sock Debacle
programme.desc: When Bonnie’s dinosaur bone is lost, the pups team up with a roadrunner to find it. The pups set out to look for Bob's favorite golf socks before he participates in a tournament.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Bark Bowl / When Hedgie Met Sallie

programme.desc: At the Valentine’s Dance, Cricket develops an unwanted crush on Gabriella.

programme.title: Washington Journal

programme.title: U.S. House of Representatives
programme.desc: Floor proceedings of the U.S. House of Representatives.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the Woods: Grief or Guilt
programme.desc: A beloved high school track star vanishes into the Philadelphia night and those in her innermost circle are eyed as suspects. When a terrifying scene is unearthed in the nearby woods, a family demands answers, but nobody is prepared for the truth. .

programme.title: Cold Justice: A Mother's Dying Wish
programme.desc: Kelly & Steve return to Hernando County, Florida to help look into the two decade old homicide of a 21-year-old woman who disappeared after a late night party. Years later her body was discovered in an orange grove nearby.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Family Betrayal
programme.desc: Kelly travels to Abbey Abbondandolo’s home state to work with the Idaho Falls PD to help investigate the 2007 homicide of a young mother. When her body was discovered almost 3 years later outside the city, it left a family searching for her killer.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Inside the Episode: Golden Years Gone
programme.desc: A former prosecutor and a former CSI investigate unsolved murder cases in small towns.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable: The Client
programme.desc: Andrea Canning will never forget this story because of the number of twists and turns. Beverly Carter was a top-selling realtor who went missing after showing a house. When her friends received mysterious text messages, they knew something was wrong.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Ultimatum
programme.desc: Michele and Lloyd Neurauter were devoted to their three daughters, even after divorce. When Michele was found dead in her home, police suspected suicide. Then, they uncovered a deadly betrayal too twisted to be true. Except that it was.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: House Of Secrets
programme.desc: Charlie Tan was an Ivy Leaguer with a bright future but then, Charlie's dad was killed. Police were told one story but the evidence was telling another.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Horror in the Home
programme.desc: Kelly & Steve Spingola partner once again to work with the Potter County Sheriff’s Department in Texas in investigating the brutal murder of a doting mother of four.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Valentine's Day Violence
programme.desc: Kelly and Tonya investigate the 2016 murder of a young Florida mother shot to death in her own home. It'll take cutting-edge forensic technology and old-school interrogation techniques to catch her killer and bring justice to her grieving mother.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Small Town Predator
programme.desc: Kelly and Johnny team up to tackle the 1988 murder of a woman whose headless body was found at a cemetery after a night at a local bar. The patrons of the bar could hold the key to identifying her killer and getting her family justice.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Mystery on the Mountain
programme.desc: Kelly and Abbey investigate the 2012 disappearance of a young father who traveled to Idaho to attend a family reunion, but never showed up. As the list of suspects grows, can the team uncover the truth behind his vanishing?

programme.title: Cold Justice: Double Life Discovered
programme.desc: Kelly and Johnny investigate one of their oldest cases ever, the brutal 1984 murder of an elderly storeowner known for having a wife with a violent temper. Was his death the robbery gone wrong it appeared to be, or a plot of his wife's design?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Over the Edge
programme.desc: Explore what happened that September night when romance turned to danger. Something went terribly wrong and a woman slipped over the edge of a cliff. Did she fall by accident or was she pushed. It would take almost 20 years to find answers.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Return to Manitowoc County
programme.desc: It's a gripping case that defies easy answers and Dateline has been following it for more than a decade. At the center, Steven Avery. He and his nephew were convicted of killing Teresa Halbach.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Twin Tragedy
programme.desc: Identical twin sisters are involved in a horrific crash on the island of Maui. Miraculously, one sister survives after their car plunges over the side of a cliff. Was this a tragic accident or something more ominous?

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Killer Fetish
programme.desc: First responders are called to the fatal shooting of a 28-year-old woman. Her estranged husband claims their bizarre sex game ended in suicide. Investigators and the victim's family believe this was a cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Deadly Betrayal
programme.desc: A decorated war hero is found in his home, the victim of an apparent drug overdose. Investigators uncover a twisted story of fraud and betrayal that leads to a stunning conclusion.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Death in a Small Town
programme.desc: An 80-year-old woman is found in her home lying in a pool of blood. Her death is ruled an accident but her family suspects foul play. In a tightknit community where neighbors look out for each other, who would want to hurt a beloved grandmother?

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Dead in the Water
programme.desc: A husband discovers his wife face down in their bathtub. Her death appears to be an accident but questions are raised about how she drowned. Was it a drug overdose? Did she slip and fall? The investigation exposes the disturbing truth.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Young Deadly Love
programme.desc: A young man calls 911 to report his fiancé fatally shot herself in their bed. Her family insists she would never take her own life. The investigation drags on for years until an unexpected development leads to a stunning conclusion.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: The Missing Bullet
programme.desc: A man discovers the body of his fiancé with an apparent self-inflicted gunshot wound. Her death is ruled a suicide but authorities are puzzled when they can't find the fatal bullet. The discovery of the missing bullet turns the case upside down.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Blind Justice
programme.desc: For investigators, motive can be the hardest thing to find. This crime took place in Florida but detectives didn't discover a motive for murder until they looked into a tropical island thousands of miles away, where a festering grudge was born.

programme.title: Movie: Kung Fu Panda 3

programme.title: Movie: How to Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Land of the Loft

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Mystery of the Dead Planets
programme.desc: Astronomers are laying the groundwork to locate a new planet for the human race to inhabit, and the more alien worlds they discover and encounter, the more they unmask the mysterious and truly destructive nature of the cosmos.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: When NASA Met Jupiter
programme.desc: NASA's Juno spacecraft is part of a cutting-edge mission to explore the mysteries of Jupiter. As this mighty probe is pummeled with deadly radiation, it gathers new data that could change everything we know about the solar system's biggest planet.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mission to a Comet
programme.desc: The Rosetta mission was a ground-breaking expedition to land on a comet. Learn what the journey discovered and how these objects helped create life on Earth.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Mystery of the Dead Planets
programme.desc: Astronomers are laying the groundwork to locate a new planet for the human race to inhabit, and the more alien worlds they discover and encounter, the more they unmask the mysterious and truly destructive nature of the cosmos.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: When NASA Met Jupiter
programme.desc: NASA's Juno spacecraft is part of a cutting-edge mission to explore the mysteries of Jupiter. As this mighty probe is pummeled with deadly radiation, it gathers new data that could change everything we know about the solar system's biggest planet.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Black Holes: The Secret Origin
programme.desc: Recent discoveries could explain how supermassive black holes grow so big, one of the universe's most mysterious questions. Neither dark matter nor cannibalism can fully explain these monsters, but the latest science might finally provide an answer.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Minotaur's Lair
programme.desc: A strange lake in Transylvania is the home of an abandoned village, and a terrifying secret. When an labyrinth is discovered on an island once home to an ancient Greek civilization, experts investigate if it was the legendary home of the Minotaur.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Terror of the Ice Snake
programme.desc: Satellites discover a mysterious trail of sinister black objects in the snow and ice of Antarctica, and when experts discover that it's moving, they use cutting-edge tech to investigate who or what is behind this strange phenomenon.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Raiders of the Holy Lance
programme.desc: A heavily armored force takes over one of Syria's most ancient archaeology sites, prompting fears that its relics are being stolen. Tanks appear to be facing off in Antarctica next to an unworldly object. A water reservoir in LA suddenly turns black.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Village of the Damned
programme.desc: A forbidden island points to a strange South American town that locals claim was the home of Adolf Hitler. New data from NASA satellites might reveal a sunken lost continent in the Indian Ocean. A pit of bodies suggests fears of a zombie nightmare.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Ship of Hell Island
programme.desc: A ghost ship is found abandoned on a remote island that's home to one of the world's last uncontacted tribes. A strange labyrinth in Sicily might have a sinister connection to the Mafia. New evidence reveals a mysterious military compound in Russia.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Did We Find Flight 370?
programme.desc: Investigators find a new clue about the missing Malaysia Airlines flight that disappeared in 2014. An astronaut spots something strange in the Sahara Desert. A mysterious orange sludge invades a remote village in Alaska.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Curse of Merlin
programme.desc: The myth of Merlin is associated with an arrangement of stones in northern France, and satellite images might finally explain this ancient riddle. Investigators uncover something mysterious buried beneath the Gulf of Mexico. An island suddenly appears.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Island of Alien Ooze
programme.desc: Satellite images capture a volcanic island that suddenly appears in the Pacific Ocean, and when NASA scientists arrive to investigate, they are baffled to find its home to a primordial slime and zombie creatures with origins in outer space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Ice Zombies
programme.desc: A zombie reindeer haunts the mountains of Norway. Strange circles appear in the sand by a secret US military base. A gigantic streak in the Arctic points towards alien life. Cutting-edge technology helps experts answer these mysteries from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Phantoms in the Chamber of Secrets
programme.desc: Evidence of a mysterious 5,000-year-old structure suddenly appears in Ireland. A top-secret machine that can see back in time. A satanic pentagram in the snow that points to witchcraft in the New World.

programme.title: What on Earth?: CIA Killer Monks
programme.desc: Something strange in the Himalayas could be evidence of a top-secret CIA program to turn monks into killer agents, and cutting-edge science helps experts investigate the truth behind this mysterious anomaly.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Genghis Khan
programme.desc: A strange structure is discovered in the Gobi Desert, and experts investigate if this mysterious site could reveal the whereabouts of lost treasure, which might change everything we know about Genghis Khan and the Mongol warriors who once lived here.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Amazon's Secret Nightmare
programme.desc: When satellites spot anomalies in the unexplored Amazonian jungle, experts wonder if they've discovered relics of a lost civilization. An on-the-ground investigation reveals a dark truth that's more sinister than ever imagined.

programme.title: See No Evil: Captured on Camera
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, a 22-year-old nursing assistant vanishes. When police check the local CCTV footage, they discover that Carlesha Freeland-Gaither was violently abducted right on camera.

programme.title: See No Evil: Stalking Carl
programme.desc: August 18, 2015. 36-year-old Carl Starke is shot dead in cold blood close to his home in St. Augustine, Florida. There are no witnesses, but neighbours did hear shots. Armed with a likely time of death, police turn to CCTV to help hunt his killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Graveyard Shift
programme.desc: On October 1st, 2009, 37-year-old Natasha Cournoyer disappears without a trace in Laval, Canada. As her friends and family struggle for answers, detectives must follow a stone-cold trail to uncover her final footsteps caught on surveillance cameras.

programme.title: See No Evil: It Came Back
programme.desc: When a young mother of two is found brutally murdered at home, suspicion falls on her friends. Detectives zero in on multiple suspects but as each one tells a different story; they don't know who to trust. Surveillance footage may reveal the truth.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: This Guy's Getting Paranoid
programme.desc: Roaa Al-Dhanoon has disappeared. What begins as a missing persons case, takes a disturbing turn by someone who is closest to her. Now, detectives must unravel a complex web of deceit that continues to strike fear throughout the devastated community.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Girl in the Crowd
programme.desc: What starts as a calm night at the American Legion in Evansville, Indiana, quickly takes a turn when Anthony Blaylock is shot dead. But when detectives obtain video surveillance showing who is responsible, they stop at nothing to find his killer.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Message From the Grave
programme.desc: Michelle Despinasse is shot inside her own home in Nanuet, New York. She is rushed to hospital but succumbs to her injuries. Investigators discover that in her final moments, Michelle made a secret recording that will reveal her killer's identity.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: This Guy's Getting Paranoid
programme.desc: Roaa Al-Dhanoon has disappeared. What begins as a missing persons case, takes a disturbing turn by someone who is closest to her. Now, detectives must unravel a complex web of deceit that continues to strike fear throughout the devastated community.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Girl in the Crowd
programme.desc: What starts as a calm night at the American Legion in Evansville, Indiana, quickly takes a turn when Anthony Blaylock is shot dead. But when detectives obtain video surveillance showing who is responsible, they stop at nothing to find his killer.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Message From the Grave
programme.desc: Michelle Despinasse is shot inside her own home in Nanuet, New York. She is rushed to hospital but succumbs to her injuries. Investigators discover that in her final moments, Michelle made a secret recording that will reveal her killer's identity.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Graveyard Shift
programme.desc: On October 1st, 2009, 37-year-old Natasha Cournoyer disappears without a trace in Laval, Canada. As her friends and family struggle for answers, detectives must follow a stone-cold trail to uncover her final footsteps caught on surveillance cameras.

programme.title: The 1980s: The Deadliest Decade: The Libertyville Horror
programme.desc: This infamous house in Old Louisville, Kentucky has dark secrets lurking within its walls.

programme.title: The 1990s: The Deadliest Decade: Don't Ask Don't Tell
programme.desc: In 1992, Allen Schindler, a young American sailor, is beaten to death in Japan. Ten days later, his tattered body returns home, with little information from the Navy. His mother goes on a desperate quest to learn who's behind her son's vicious murder.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cults: The Nuwaubian Nation of Moors
programme.desc: The followers of cult leader Dwight York come from all walks of life. Ruby joins the Nuwaubian Nation when looking for answers to life's big questions while Niki is brought in as a child. Both become disillusioned as they learn the truth about York.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cults: Word of Life
programme.desc: The Word of Life Church, starts as a small bible study group led by Pastor Jerry Irwin. After his death, his daughter Tiffanie gains control and makes life hell for the church followers, leading to the brutal death of a teenaged boy.

programme.title: Stranger Among Us: Homicide on the Rails
programme.desc: A spring break adventure turns deadly when a college student infiltrates a community of train hoppers.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Going Postal
programme.desc: When US postal worker Kim accepts a ride to the Orange County fair from a quiet co-worker, she has no idea that she will become the center of a terrifying campaign of stalking, harassment, and obsession.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Blood in the Barn
programme.desc: Small-town gal Frankie Cochran thinks she's found the one in handsome David Gehrard. But as his behavior brings rising cause for concern, Frankie wonders if a secret from his past might hold more meaning than she first thought.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Campus Tragedy
programme.desc: John Walsh spotlights freshman who allegedly introduces a knife to a fistfight that claims a star college student's life. Later, Callahan Walsh looks for Thayne Smika, who, police believe, shoots his roommate in cold blood over back rent.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Serial Confessions
programme.desc: Watch and hear the shocking confession of a real estate agent turned serial killer and a stunning rescue video of a woman held hostage in a shipping container.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Golden State Killer
programme.desc: In the 1970s a serial rapist is on the loose in northern California. And just as his reign of terror over the community wanes, police discover he isn't just a serial rapist, he's a serial murderer and he's been killing people all over California.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Murder on His Mind
programme.desc: A young Iowa man is shot dead while he sleeps peacefully next to his fiancée. Investigators wonder how she remained unharmed, and suspicion quickly swirls around her and two of her ex-boyfriends.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Murder in Macks Creek
programme.desc: Trudy Darby is murdered in Mack's Creek, MO. When two more local women go missing police fear a serial killer. Silence reigns over the town until a call out of the blue reveals the killers are uncomfortably close to home.

programme.title: Disappeared: Born This Way
programme.desc: When Sage Smith, a transgender teen in Charlottesville, Virginia goes missing, police identify a suspect. But the investigation turns up evidence that forces detectives to look closer into Sage's inner circle to see if there are answers.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Yankees, Rebels and World War II
programme.desc: World War II myths are explored. Forgotten truths of America's Civil War are examined.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Science or Sci-Fi?
programme.desc: The science in our nation's history is examined. Explore the myths that infect America's medical history and learn the facts behind America's nuclear age.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Monumental Realities
programme.desc: The myths behind some of history's most defining moments are uncovered, as well as revealing facts behind America's space explorations.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: Ultimate Firepower

programme.title: Combat Countdown: Long Range Strikers
programme.desc: In every theatre of war, long-range weaponry gives you the ability to reach out and touch your opponent while staying out of harm's way. It's a critical edge that can be the difference between victory and defeat.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth
programme.desc: Celebrating the icons and legends of the American West as immortalized by Hollywood. From the great stars like Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and Steve McQueen, to the great directors like John Ford, Sergio Leone, and Sam Peckinpah.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Blood Treasure
programme.desc: Conflicts between Nazi Germany and the Soviet Union cost millions of lives. The war also led to two of the most infamous and mysterious treasure thefts ever. The team searches for the Amber Room and the missing Berlin treasure hoard.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Stealing Italy
programme.desc: The team is on the trail of two iconic treasures: $1.5 billion worth of gold looted from the Bank of Italy and missing art from the great museums of Florence.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: City of Loot
programme.desc: The team investigates the systematic looting of Paris during four years of Nazi occupation and tracks missing treasures to Berlin and Switzerland.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Guns
programme.desc: The guns used in modern warfare are a terrifying fusion of unparalleled accuracy, range and stopping power. Take an inside look at the most ubiquitous and fundamental assets on the battlefield.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: Surgical Strikers
programme.desc: The ability to deploy precision strike weapons has completely changed the nature of war. Advances in weapon technology have made it possible to send a missile through a specific window of a building from a thousand miles away.

programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Pink Shack
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: Restored: 1930s Colorful Spanish Colonial Farmhouse
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1930s two-story Spanish Colonial farmhouse in Fontana, California. He learns the rich history of the home which then guides his design plan for the house exterior, entryway, living room and kitchen.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: Preservationist Brett Waterman transforms homes with fascinating stories and unrealized potential. Many of these homes suffer from neglect, bad renovations and ugly additions.

programme.title: Restored: 1906 Arts and Crafts House
programme.desc: Brett is called upon to restore a historically significant 1906 arts and crafts home. He brings it back to its original glory by reintroducing the closed-in fireplaces, re-instating the floor plan and replacing the 1980s kitchen.

programme.title: Restored: 1901 Neoclassical Victorian
programme.desc: Brett helps an engaged couple restore their Victorian home, including a new kitchen and bathroom before their big wedding day. Brett begins work on the kitchen, removing additions and wallpaper.

programme.title: Restored: 1927 Arts and Crafts Bungalow

programme.title: Restored: 1954 Modern California Ranch

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Eyesore to Ultimate Pool Party Paradise
programme.desc: A family that loves to entertain relocates from Chicago to Nashville. They are in desperate need of a pool for the hot summer days. However, their backyard is not functional for the kids, so Kelly, Christian and Cameron work to transform the space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Champagne Spa Wishes and Forever-home Dreams
programme.desc: Grandparents Joe and Beth want to add a dream pool to their forever home so they can host more family events. They hope the addition of this backyard oasis will complete their dream home and allow them to create many more memories outside.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Living La Vida Lakeside
programme.desc: After 14 years of dreaming, a Lake Jackson, Texas, family is finally building their custom home on a piece of land around Pecan Lake. Located on a peninsula, the backyard leaves the ideal space to build a one-of-a-kind vanishing edge pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Flawed to Flawless
programme.desc: A Franklin, TN, couple enlists the Pool Kings to build their dream pool in their very challenging backyard.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Overgrown to Over the Top
programme.desc: A Franklin, Tennessee, family has been living with an unfinished pool for over two years and is in desperate need of a pool rescue. The Pool Kings step in to transform this backyard from a state of chaos to something beyond their wildest dreams.

programme.title: Pool Kings: I'm on Vacation Already
programme.desc: Now that the interior of their dream house is finished, a family of five asks the Pool Kings to transform their neglected backyard. They want a relaxing multi-level private resort with a waterfall grotto, huge spa, swim-up bar and outdoor living room.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Texas Staycation Paradise
programme.desc: A young family wants to build a 'refined rustic' staycation paradise in their Austin, Texas backyard. Mike and Jim answer the call by building their dream oasis with waterfalls, LED lights, a swim-up bar and a barbecue cabana as the finishing touch.

programme.title: Pool Kings: My Last Pool Was An Iron Tub
programme.desc: A ranch family in Palm Desert, CA, is finally ready to build the desert oasis they've been dreaming of for 20 years. Their backyard paradise includes a complex of waterfalls, a natural boulder spillway, a hidden waterslide, and outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Stay the Course
programme.desc: The Pool Kings head to Austin, Texas to build a pool alongside a golf course. The guys have their work cut out for them as they work to create a feature-filled pool that works in all seasons, provides privacy from golfers and matches the new patio.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Welcome to Fire Island
programme.desc: A North Carolina family is eager to finally have their first pool. Their expansive backyard allows for an over-the-top, resort-style pool, so the crew take on an extensive build with a 30-foot waterfall, lazy river and a sunken fire pit island.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Super Smoked and Savory
programme.desc: In Queens, New York, Michael Symon dives into the juiciest, meatiest, triple-stacked burger with beef, lamb and turkey. Some of the most authentic Mexican lamb barbacoa this side of the border is found in Houston, Texas.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Build Your Own Burger
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon starts at the ultimate custom burger bar in Providence, Rhode Island, where he chooses from over 400,000 topping combinations to create his own meaty masterpiece.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Supersized
programme.desc: On this episode, Noah's safe word is more, as he takes it to the limit with seven of the most belly-busting carnival eats around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Heat Is On
programme.desc: Hot, hot, hot carnival treats are the stars of this episode. From pleasingly piquant pretzels in California, to sweet and fiery desserts in New York, Noah gets up the courage to sample seven of the spiciest midway munchies from coast to coast.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Close Encounters Of The Food Kind
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is hot on the trail of some otherworldly carnival eats at the UFO Festival in Roswell.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Planet of the Funnel Cakes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe drops in on central California's Placer County Fair, the home of some one-of-a-kind fair foods.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Eggs Men
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets the royal treatment with "ye olde eats" at the Hoggetown Medieval Faire in Gainesville, Fla. Meat is all over the menu, and Noah goes wild for the smoked bison burger and the wild boar leg.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Planet of the Dates
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is ready for 1,001 nights of fun at the Arabian Nights-themed Riverside County Fair and National Date Festival in Indio, Calif. He makes a date with a dangerous burger and enjoys a sweet mashup with the churro dog.

programme.desc: Roger Mooking explores the foods that are just too good together to be kept apart, showcasing 15 culinary combinations that make mouths water and hearts race. From an extraordinary take on chicken and waffles to a handmade root beer float.
