programme.desc: Roger Mooking checks out the best surf-and-turf dishes in restaurants across America. He joins chefs to learn how to put amazing combinations together including the classic lobster tail and steak, clam and bacon pizza, and more.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Super-Sized
programme.desc: Roger Mooking sets out on a culinary odyssey around the country to find the 12 best super-sized dishes. He's hanging out with chefs to learn all their secrets for creating ultimate omelets, steaks, sandwiches, seafood platters and more.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smoking and Spit-Roasting in Texas
programme.desc: Roger Mooking finds two chefs in Texas who are pushing the boundaries of whole hog barbecue, where pigs are roasted low and slow over coals before the meat is chopped or pulled and seasoned with sauce.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Get Your Grill On
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Lockhart, Texas, to meet the team responsible for designing and crafting a monster rig that offers seven different cooking contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ and Boils in the Bayou
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits the Louisiana bayou for barbecue, brunch and a crawfish boil. In Prairieville, L.A., he helps a husband-and-wife team of caterers prepare baby back ribs, brisket and 200 pounds of live crawfish.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Couples
programme.desc: From live-fire cooking to low-and-slow barbecue, Roger Mooking meets up with two couples making fiery feasts and creating sparks in California.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard BBQ Blowouts
programme.desc: Roger Mooking drops in at two backyard cookouts where the smoke is thick and the fires are hot. He helps guest chef Jeremy Conner prepare a fish roast at renowned bed and breakfast Maison Madeleine in Breaux Bridge, L.A.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Lighting Up Louisiana
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Louisiana, where smoked meat makes an appearance in many classic Cajun dishes. He meets Chef Nathanial Zimet, who serves North Carolina-style smoked whole hog in po' boy sandwiches at Bourree in New Orleans.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Cornfields to Canada
programme.desc: Noah Cappe kicks things off in Polk County, Minnesota, where he goes local with the North Woods sandwich and Barbe-chos. Then it’s across the border to the Red River Exhibition to experience a Canadian classic, prairie poutine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Heatwave to Heartland
programme.desc: Summer is sizzling on the West Coast and Noah Cappe is ready to cool things down with a hazel nutty deep fried pop. Meanwhile, in the Midwest, Reverend Tom’s cowboy beans makes a believer out of fairgoers.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From West Coast to Wisconsin
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe starts the day off right with breakfast on a stick, and gets to down to business with the pink taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Lights and Literature
programme.desc: Noah tries his hand at making a deep fried root beer float and torches a berry brulee waffle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Burgers and Bombs

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cowboys and Cakes

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Simmons vs. Burgess
programme.desc: After meeting on a dating site, a 20-year-old Columbus, GA woman discovers her 'single' boyfriend hiding a relationship!

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Ashley says her ex Lorenzo duped her for a cell phone and a trip to Puerto Rico, which she wants to be compensated for. Lorenzo says Ashley offered to help him out financially when he was between jobs and that he owes her nothing.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The plaintiff is suing her former landlord for rent, a security deposit and harassment.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Cracking Up a Customer.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Dragging His Feet' and 'Being Chilly.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Expel the Bully, Not My Son
programme.desc: A father sues his son's school after an expulsion related to repeated bullying.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Lacey says Aldrickus failed to complete her dog grooming business, but Aldrickus says he paid money for materials and started framing the building, so he doesn't owe her the full amount.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Molestation: Updates After the Results
programme.desc: Stephanie came on the show because she believed her ex-husband, Arin was also involved in her newborn's death. Her mother, Theresa believed Arin was innocent. See what has happened after the results were revealed.

programme.title: Maury
programme.desc: Maury Povich explores compelling issues that impact society as a whole, and digs deep to get to the heart of the matter.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: I Have a Gay Fetish
programme.desc: Chase's wife Katherine and brother drop a bomb on him. Deldrick comes clean to his girlfriend Retha about his double life. Chyanne's friend Jasmine hooked up with her boyfriend to get back at Chyanne for doing the same to her in the past.

programme.title: Maury: You Can't Fool the Test ... Exposed Cheaters Are Back!
programme.desc: See if these women where duped by the men they love, how they got caught in the act, and which men were able to withstand the results of the polygraph test in this April Fool's edition of Maury.
